title: PMM-PROD P5: Paper trading com dados live

context.description:
## P5 Paper Trading — Operational Run

Config: paper/runs/p5-001.yaml
Duration: 8h
Capital: $500 (paper)
Market: Iran Regime Jun30

### Pre-requisites (all met ✅)
- Balance-aware quoting (Gate 5) ✅
- Position recycling ✅
- Startup reconciliation ✅
- Trade dedup persistence ✅

### Steps
1. Start paper runner: `cd polymarket-mm && nohup python3 -m paper.paper_runner --config paper/runs/p5-001.yaml > logs/p5-001.log 2>&1 &`
2. Monitor via pmm-status-updater cron (every 15min)
3. After 4h: check PnL, fill rate, inventory drift
4. After 8h: kill, analyze, report

### Success Criteria
- PnL positivo em >60% das horas
- Fill rate >= 5%
- Balance nunca chega a zero
- Net inventory < 150
